reasoning: The SOC2 control A1.2 focuses on backup and disaster recovery, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that etcd (the primary data store for Kubernetes) is properly backed up and encrypted. Additionally, ensuring that secrets (which may contain sensitive data) are backed up and can be recovered is crucial. Configuring policies for disaster recovery at the pod level can also help in maintaining application availability.
title: A1.2 Backup and Disaster Recovery: The entity implements backup processes, data recovery infrastructure, and environmental protections
